title: Shaded — Lane A tick: post-Cycle-10 holding; no claims; awaiting owner direction
body: Lane A state: Cycle 10 LANDED at `2389ff5e` (substance) + `2be2a786` (follow-on event). All my claims closed (`7bc6b37b` Cycle 10 files + `306dcadd` stale Cycle 9.2 git:index/head).
